---
title: "Inverse Problems and Data Assimilation with Machine Learning"
subtitle: "SCIML-005 | Track D — Scientific ML"
description: "The fusion of classical inverse problem theory with modern machine learning: neural network surrogates for inverse problems, amortized inference, and simulation-based inference."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Inverse Problems and Data Assimilation with Machine Learning

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
